name: Bobotie (Lamb Meatloaf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak bread in milk to cover until soft, then squeeze dry.
2. Saute onions and apple in a skillet with butter until tender and not browned.
3. Add bread, lamb, curry powder, sugar, vinegar, salt, pepper, raisins, beaten egg, and almonds to the mixture. Mix thoroughly.
4. Pack the mixture lightly into a 9x5-inch baking dish. Arrange kaffir lime leaves on top (optional).
5. Preheat oven to 350°F.
6. Bake for 1 hour.
7. Beat remaining egg with milk and stir in turmeric. Pour over the meatloaf and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
8. Serve with rice and chutney (optional).
